---
title: "The Team"
subtitle: "Team HeeHaa"
date: last-modified
toc: false
---

> *(placeholder)* Introduce the team members and their contributions.

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
### Member 1
_Role / focus_

_Short bio and contributions._
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
### Member 2
_Role / focus_

_Short bio and contributions._
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
### Member 3
_Role / focus_

_Short bio and contributions._
:::

:::

## Contributions

| Member | Contribution |
|---|---|
| _name_ | _what they did_ |
| _name_ | _what they did_ |
| _name_ | _what they did_ |
